title: Zelenskyy thanks G7 leaders for ‘strong ideas on how to force Russia into peace’ – Europe live
summary_full: Ukrainian president praises successful talks after Trump’s comments tha ‘Russia should make a deal’ following G7 meeting… and given the delay this morning, the meeting may or may not have happened already – guess we will find out at some point during the day.in Évian-les-Bains Continue reading...
